backend/main.mo: Main actor defining event management system with user profiles, events, organizers, bookings, reviews, and event photos. Includes authorization mixins, blob storage, CRUD operations for all entities, and role-based access control with query/update functions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining OldActor and NewActor types to handle schema evolution, specifically adding eventPhotos map and photoIdCounter to persistent state while preserving existing data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features for event photo upload, gallery display, deletion, and React Query hooks with high confidence and mapped test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including pages, hooks, auth, layout, events, and organizer components with details on functionality, styling, and authentication guards.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, borders, and sidebar components using oklch color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx, titled 'FIESTA'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component with TanStack Router setup defining routes for landing, guest, organizer, and admin pages, wrapped in Layout with Header, Footer, and conditional ProfileSetupModal based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsC: Reusable analytics card component displaying icon, label, value, and optional description with shadow effects and navy text styling.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsD: Displays admin analytics dashboard with cards showing total organizers, total events, most popular event type, and highest rated organizer using data from queries.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Renders a login/logout button that handles Internet Identity authentication, manages login state, and clears query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for new users to complete their profile by entering full name and email, with validation and submission to backend.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingR: Modal for guests to create booking requests by selecting one of their events and submitting to an organizer, with success feedback and navigation.
frontend/src/components/booking/GuestBoo: Displays a list of booking cards for guests, showing booking status, organizer details, and associated event information with icons and badges.
frontend/src/components/booking/Organize: Card component for organizers to view booking requests with event details and approve/reject action buttons for pending requests.
Organizes and displays organizer bookings in two sections: pending requests and past bookings, using OrganizerBookingCard components.
frontend/src/components/events/CreateEve: Form for guests to create events with fields for event type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number, with validation preventing past dates.
frontend/src/components/events/EventList: Displays a list of events in card format, showing event type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number with formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders a footer with copyright information and a link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main navigation header with logo, authenticated user menu (events, organizers, bookings, dashboard), login button, and responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/organizer/EventP: Displays event photos in a responsive grid with lightbox modal for full-size viewing and keyboard navigation support.
Handles event photo uploads with file validation (5MB max, image types only), preview, batch upload progress, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Organi: Displays organizer profile card with company details, portfolio images, ratings, and booking modal trigger with optional selection checkbox.
Sortable table comparing multiple organizers by rating or experience, with booking action buttons that open booking modals.

Form component for creating/editing organizer profiles with fields for company name, contact, experience, pricing, description, and availability status. Includes validation and uses mutation hook to save profile data.

Display component that renders an organizer's profile information in cards, showing company details, contact info, experience, pricing, reviews, availability badge, and includes a portfolio gallery section.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Portfo: Gallery component that displays portfolio images in a grid with lightbox functionality for full-screen viewing, navigation between images, and fallback handling for missing images. Checks sessionStorage cache before loading from static assets.

Upload interface for organizers to add/delete portfolio images with file validation (type, size), preview functionality, progress tracking, and confirmation dialogs for deletion. Manages both new uploads and existing images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing with admin token and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, with proper loading states and retry configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend API calls including user profiles, events, organizers, bookings, reviews, availability, and portfolio/photo management. Provides both query hooks (for fetching data) and mutation hooks (for creating/updating data) with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for navy/gold theme colors, light/dark mode support, and utility classes for shadows and color variants. Defines typography using Inter and Playfair Display fonts.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only dashboard page that checks user role and redirects non-admin users, displaying an AnalyticsDashboard component for authorized admins.
frontend/src/pages/GuestBookings.tsx: Guest bookings page that displays a list of the authenticated user's bookings using the GuestBookingList component.
Guest event management page with a two-column layout showing a CreateEventForm and an EventList of the user's existing events.
frontend/src/pages/GuestOrganizerBrowsin: Organizer browsing page for guests that displays organizer cards with selection capability, comparison button, and a lightbox dialog for viewing portfolio images with keyboard navigation.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with hero section, feature cards highlighting platform benefits (event planning, organizer discovery, comparison, tracking), and call-to-action sections.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerBookingManag: Organizer-facing page that displays booking requests using the OrganizerBookingList component with navigation back to the organizer dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerComparison.t: Comparison page that filters organizers based on URL query parameters and displays them in a side-by-side comparison table using OrganizerComparisonTable component.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: Main dashboard page for organizers that displays profile management (create/edit/view), portfolio upload and gallery, and event photo upload and gallery sections with navigation to booking requests.
frontend/src/ui/button.tsx: Reusable Button component built with Radix UI and class-variance-authority, supporting multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon).
frontend/src/ui/card.tsx: Set of Card components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction) for consistent layout and styling of content containers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme (navy, gold), extended theme properties (shadows, fonts, animations), and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document showing an event management app with event photo storage features in progress, including backend stable storage, upload interface, gallery view, and delete functionality requirements.
